description: CompositionBlack round neck, sleeveless blouson top made of 100% polyester, with sequence and metal faceted embellishments along the neckline and a bow strap at the back neckFittingRegularWash careMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringUse mild detergent onlyDry in shadeMedium ironPerfect for those weekend parties, this black top from jealous 21 is stylish to the hilt. The sequence and metal faceted embellishments along the neckline add a glamourous touch to this blouson top, while the bow strap at the back helps you create a snug, customised and fantabulous Fit. Team this with skin tight jeans or skirts and stylish footwear available at myntra, and rock the party!Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
